verdict: Superior AM moisturizer combining ceramides, niacinamide for skin strengthening, and built-in SPF 30. This is an excellent all-in-one solution for daily morning protection and hydration.

_research.name: CeraVe Facial Moisturizing Lotion AM
pros: Triple ceramide + niacinamide combination strengthens barrier
Integrated SPF 30 eliminates extra product step
Lightweight formula works under makeup (12400 reviews)
_research.con: Fragrance may irritate highly sensitive skin despite generally hypoallergenic formulation.
